name: (2R,3S)-3-isopropylmalate to H2O
summary: A 16-step route from (2R,3S)-3-isopropylmalate(2−) to H2O, ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: 2-acyl-4-prenylphloroglucinol 6-prenyltransferase
reactions.equation: deoxyhumulone + dimethylallyl diphosphate = lupulone + diphosphate + H(+)
